queries.question: Which country in North America had the most immigrants?
queries.sql: select C.countryName from country C inner join ImmigrationStats on C.id = ImmigrationStats.countryId where C.continent = 'North America' order by ImmigrationStats.numberOfImmigrants desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?countryname WHERE {
  ?c a :Countries .
  ?immigrationstats a :ImmigrationStats .
  ?immigrationstats p:hasCountry ?c .
  ?c p:countryName ?countryname .
  ?c p:continent ?continent_f .
  ?immigrationstats p:numberOfImmigrants ?numberofimmigrants_o .
  FILTER(?continent_f = "North America")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numberofimmigrants_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which country in North America had the most immigrants?
queries.sql: select C.countryName from country C inner join ImmigrationStats on C.id = ImmigrationStats.countryId where C.continent = 'North America' order by ImmigrationStats.immigrantPercentage desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?countryname WHERE {
  ?c a :Countries .
  ?immigrationstats a :ImmigrationStats .
  ?immigrationstats p:hasCountry ?c .
  ?c p:countryName ?countryname .
  ?c p:continent ?continent_f .
  ?immigrationstats p:immigrantPercentage ?immigrantpercentage_o .
  FILTER(?continent_f = "North America")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?immigrantpercentage_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which country in North America had the most immigrants?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?countryname WHERE {
  ?c a :Countries .
  ?immigrationstats a :ImmigrationStats .
  ?immigrationstats p:hasCountry ?c .
  ?c p:countryName ?countryname .
  ?c p:continent ?continent_f .
  ?immigrationstats p:numberOfImmigrants ?numberofimmigrants_o .
  FILTER(?continent_f = "North America")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numberofimmigrants_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?countryname WHERE {
  ?c a :Countries .
  ?immigrationstats a :ImmigrationStats .
  ?immigrationstats p:hasCountry ?c .
  ?c p:countryName ?countryname .
  ?c p:continent ?continent_f .
  ?immigrationstats p:immigrantPercentage ?immigrantpercentage_o .
  FILTER(?continent_f = "North America")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?immigrantpercentage_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
